name: CrowdStrike LogScale
description: Log management and observability platform (formerly Humio). Monitor data repositories and log ingestion.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to LogScale (Humio)
2. Go to Settings → API Tokens
3. Create a new token with read permissions
4. Enter your LogScale URL and the token below

credentialFields.label: LogScale URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your LogScale instance URL (e.g. https://cloud.community.humio.com or your self-hosted URL). No trailing slash.

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in LogScale → Settings → API Tokens.

checks.name: LogScale App Availability
checks.description: Verifies CrowdStrike LogScale API is accessible.

checks.name: LogScale Monitoring
checks.description: Verifies log repositories are configured for monitoring.
